targets.expr: max by (subnet_name) (last_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="kea_subnet"} | json | unwrap active_leases [5m]))
max by (subnet_name) (last_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="kea_subnet"} | json | unwrap usage_pct [5m]))

panels.title: DHCP Events (時間ごとリース取得)

targets.expr: max by (subnet_name) (last_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="kea_subnet"} | json | unwrap active_leases [1m]))

panels.description: (cache_hits + packetcache_hits) / questions。packet-cache と recursor-cache の両層を合算した真のヒット率。

targets.expr: (sum(sum_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="recursor"} | json | unwrap cache_hits_delta [15m])) + sum(sum_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="recursor"} | json | unwrap packetcache_hits_delta [15m]))) / sum(sum_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="recursor"} | json | unwrap questions_delta [15m]))

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio (total, 15m)

targets.expr: (sum(sum_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="recursor"} | json | unwrap cache_hits_delta [$__interval])) + sum(sum_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="recursor"} | json | unwrap packetcache_hits_delta [$__interval]))) / sum(sum_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="recursor"} | json | unwrap questions_delta [$__interval]))

panels.description: pct は top 20 内シェア (Rest 除外母数、合計 = 100%)。raw_pct が ring buffer 全体に対する %。rec_control top-queries 最新バッチ。
panels.title: Top Domains (直近スナップショット)

panels.description: pct は top 20 内シェア (ring buffer の Rest を母数から除外、上位合計 = 100%)。最新 2 分内の値を使用。

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (qname) (last_over_time({source="dhcpdns", type="recursor_topq"} | json | qname != `rest` | unwrap pct [2m])))

panels.title: Top 10 Domains (直近スナップショット %)
